channel.title: Maintenance on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Maintenance on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: How to Clean a Coffee Grinder: Burr, Blade, and Every Major Brand
item.description: How to clean a coffee grinder the right way — burr and blade, Breville, Baratza, Niche, Eureka, manual hand grinders, with a deep-clean schedule and stale-oil fix.

item.title: How to Descale an Espresso Machine: Complete Guide for Every Brand
item.description: How to descale an espresso machine the right way — for Breville, Gaggia, Rancilio, Lelit, and dual-boiler machines. Step-by-step, with backflushing, water hardness, and a maintenance schedule.

item.title: How to Clean Your Espresso Machine: Daily, Weekly, and Monthly Schedule
item.description: Complete cleaning guide for home espresso machines. Daily, weekly, and monthly maintenance routines to keep your machine running and your coffee tasting great.
